name: dox402
description: Pay-per-use AI inference gateway. Authenticate with Ethereum wallet, pay with USDC on Base Mainnet, get streamed AI responses.

authentication.description: SIWE (EIP-4361) wallet authentication. See the 'authenticate' flow below, or use the SIGN-IN-WITH-X header for single-request auth.

flows.name: authenticate
flows.description: Authenticate with an Ethereum wallet using SIWE (EIP-4361) to obtain a 24-hour session token

steps.description: Request a one-time nonce for your wallet address
Construct an EIP-4361 message with the nonce, sign it with personal_sign, and submit both

flows.name: infer
flows.description: Run AI text generation. Returns an SSE stream. Requires authentication and a positive credit balance.

steps.description: Returns 200 with SSE stream if balance > 0. Returns 402 with payment instructions if balance is zero.

flows.name: check-balance
flows.description: Query current credit balance and usage statistics

flows.name: upload-document
flows.description: Upload a text document for RAG (retrieval-augmented generation). The document is chunked, embedded, and stored in Vectorize.

steps.description: Upload plain text content (max 100KB, max 50 docs per wallet). Embedding cost deducted from balance.

flows.name: list-documents
flows.description: List all uploaded documents for this wallet

flows.name: deposit
flows.description: Top up credit balance by submitting an on-chain USDC payment proof

steps.description: Get the USDC payment address and network details
Submit proof of on-chain USDC transfer. The proof must be signed by the wallet and the transaction must be confirmed on Base Mainnet.
